examples: Tony has now been thrust into the limelight, with a high-profile job.
A male bird of paradise may put himself in the limelight by displaying his spectacular plumage in the best stage setting to attract a female.
She seems fond of the limelight.
Despite less than gaudy stats, a Super Bowl victory would catapult Sanchez into Madison Avenue limelight.
Colorful eccentricities aside, Mr. Kelley is also a shrewd businessman who avoids the limelight.
